EL MEJOR JUEGO QUE PUDE HABER JUGADO.

Um dos melhores jogos, se não o melhor de todos os tempos ... Quem nunca jogou este jogo em uma Lan House não sabe o que era diversão. Jogo até hoje e provavelmente não irei parar tão cedo, mesmo com as novas greções em alta, o famoso "CS 1.6" será o mais lembrado. Sobre o jogo, diversos Maps onde você pode plantar uma bomba caso se um TR ou desarmá-la caso seja um CT, também maps onde é preciso resgatar reféns, maps onde as armas começam no chão entre outras ... Muito fácil de ser configurado, movimentos simples e fáceis de se executar, porém com um maior estudo você adiquire novas habilidades como o Bunny Jump, Duck Jump, Quick Scope, e assim passa a ser melhor que seus amigos, recomendo este jogo a quem queira passar algumas horas relembrando o velho CS. Maps preferidos dos jogadores: de_dust2, de_nuke, de_train, de_inferno, cs_assault, de_mirage, awp_india entre outros. Armas preferidas: AK-47, M4A1 (colt), Desert Eagle, USP, AWP, entre outras ...

It's Counter-strike.  You'll run it well on any computer made in the last 25 years, you can find servers playing any game mode you feel like, and you don't have to deal with loot boxes.  What are you going to have to deal with when trying to play it in the present?  Most of the people you play with are going to be Hispanic or Russian, the servers are going to be modded to feature music, strange skins, parachutes and other weird shit.  Every server is its own community in a way, which also means that if you piss off the wrong person you'll probably end up banned.  You know... Counter-strike.  GL HF

Шедевр, а не игра!!! С данной игрой я познакомился достаточно давно. Она мне очень сильно нравилась, как и сейчас. В неё можно было играть как одному, так и с друзьями. И она могла затянуть на долгие часы. У игры есть свой главный плюс - баланс. Такого баланса не удавалось добиться еще ни одной игре этого жанра. Она можно сказать сделала революцию среди игр. Хотелось бы отметить, что Counter Strike это не та игра, где от игрока требуется просто бежать в случайную сторону и по пути стрелять по врагам. Тут присутствуют элементы стратегии. От этого играть становится в разы интереснее. Из минусов могу отметить обилие читеров на серверах, во многих случаях их конечно банят, но иногда они остаются безнаказанными. Также в игре довольно устаревшая графика,но по сути она не очень важна. Присутствуют и баги, но они незначительны.

有的一百多个G的游戏你玩了半个小时就腻了，有的几百兆的游戏你能玩一个下午不关电脑。十多年前，三两伙伴，一个机房，几台白色大头机，一碟软盘挨个塞。就能酣战一个下午。这是80后的青春，90后的童年，00后的小友。 在开始游戏时可能会遇到的以下几类问题及解决办法： 1：总是闪退（该问题常见于win10，11） 那是你输入法的问题，切换到大写然后换一下美式键盘就可以 2：自建房没人机 按h 3：调了准星大小没变化 要记得先按“提交”再确定 4：为啥有黑边 换宽屏即可 5：为啥听不到原版无线电语音包 你的默认语言可能不包含英语

There's a reason it is one of the most played first person shooters of all time. Many years later Counter-Strike 1.6 is still going strong.

Só recomendo CS porque, dos jogos de tiro gratuitos e populares, esse ainda é o melhorzinho. Agora tem que ter paciência ou só jogar com amigos, porque tem muito cheater. Do que adianta ter um aviso de "Sala Segura", que quem usa cheats será banido se um time inteiro usa e não acontece nada? Os caras não são habilidosos, são trapaceiros. O ruim é que quem realmente joga bem acaba saindo prejudicado, seja por não conseguir jogar direito, seja por ser banido sem ter trapaceado, isso quando banem alguém. O jogo só não perde tantos jogadores por conta da nostalgia, por ser um clássico. Headshot de faca sendo que foi de baixo para cima? Tiro atravessando parede? O cara mira pra direita e acerta o adversário que está na esquerda? O jogador atravessa o mapa todo levando tiro e não perde nenhum ponto de vida? Quando um jogador leva tiros ele fica mais lento, mas se ele tiver de faca nenhuma bala acerta ele? É daqui pra pior. Mas ainda rende bons momentos.
Muito bom cara esta entre meu top 3 de melhores fps mesmo o jogo sendo antigo ainda é muito divertido de jogar e finalmente conseguir comprar ele na steam Nice game Valve :)

En física, el electrón (del griego clásico ἤλεκτρον ḗlektron 'ámbar'), comúnmente representado por el símbolo e−, es una partícula subatómica con una carga eléctrica elemental negativa. ​ Un electrón no tiene componentes o subestructura conocidos; en otras palabras, generalmente se define como una partícula elemental.

I have so many hours on it (almost too many) and I thought about trying the game that started it all, aside from Half-Life, since it was on sale for a few bucks. It was terrible.  So, what do I think? I know the game is almost 22 years old as of writing this, so I will give it the benefit of the doubt. I'm sure Valve doesn't care one bit about keeping the community alive for this game, but it is almost unplayable. Sure, there is some nostalgia for those that played it back in the day, but you are way better off just playing CS:GO nowadays if you enjoy a stable game.   There aren't any bugs or anything as Valve has always been pretty consistent with keeping a game in good shape, but the gameplay is pretty subpar for 2000. I know Counter Strike was just coming on to the scene that Call of Duty would soon overtake, but it plays like Doom from the 90's in my opinion. But, hackers are what ruin the game. It is downright unplayable because of how bad the aimbotting, flying, wallhacking, insta-killing, and many more hacks have gotten. If you load into a game, you will not get a single kill.  Even if this game becomes free at any point, do not get it. It will just waste your storage space that could be used for playable games. But props to Valve for evolving from this mess into the CS:GO we love today. <3  :(
Epic! Childhood flashback, unbeliveble great feeling

Soy un padre de 50 años, probablemente una de las personas más viejas que juegan este juego. Soy padre soltero de mi hijo, que ahora tiene 14 años. Mi hijo recientemente descargó Counter-Strike y en menos de una semana, ya había jugado durante más de 20 horas. Esto fue terrible para mí, ya que ya era bastante difícil para mí pasar tiempo con mi hijo, ya que él siempre sale con sus amigos o simplemente mira videos en Tiktok. Así que decidí crear una cuenta de Steam y comprar este juego para ver si podía jugar junto a él. Cargué el juego, hice el tutorial pero estaba atascado en lo que se suponía que debías hacer. Le pedí ayuda a mi hijo y organizó un juego para que yo me uniera. Me encantó porque era el mejor momento que había pasado con mi hijo desde que mi esposa había muerto. Desde entonces, el Counter-Strike ha acercado a mi hijo y a mí nuevamente y ahora también pasamos tiempo juntos fuera de la casa. Este juego me recordó que hay diversión en todo, y nos ha traído tanto a mí como a mi hijo muchos recuerdos felices.
This game changed my life! Legend is Legend!

优点:干脆利落的操作性，清脆爽快的打击感，畅快简单的联机，最初难忘的美好。 缺点:很多设置隐藏于控制台中，例如点按数字键直接切换相应武器，对新手玩家并不友好。缺少原生bot系统，如果没有联机，就无法独自练习。画面相对落后，妈妈所有的爱都给了csgo。 是否推荐:强烈推荐。特别是00后的孩子，这个游戏是8090年代人在网吧里经历的最初的感动。

o jogo é muito bom, ainda mais jogando em multiplayer.  mas como não tenho muito oq falar, pega uma receita de churros ae  Ingredientes MASSA: 2 xícaras de água 1 pitada de sal 2 colheres bem cheias de margarina ou manteiga 2 xícaras bem cheias de farinha de trigo RECHEIO: 1 lata de leite condensado 2 colheres de achocolatado em pó 2 colheres de pasta de amendoim (opcional) PARA GRUDAR POR FORA: Acúcar Canela   Modo de Preparo º Coloque em uma panela no fogo a água, o sal e a margarina ou manteiga. º Assim que ferver, adicione a farinha de trigo e misture até que forme uma grande bola de massa e desgrude da panela. º Coloque a massa em uma máquina plástica própria para churros e corte-os. º Coloque em uma panela uma quantidade de óleo que seja suficiente para cobrir os churros e ferva o óleo. Frite, no máximo, 3 churros por vez em fogo baixo. º Coloque os churros em papel absorvente e depois passe-os na mistura de açúcar com canela. RECHEIO: º Em um recipiente misture o leite condensado, o achocolatado e a pasta de amendoim. º Misture-os até que fique uma cor e uma textura uniforme

Ultimate classic that still holds up today.  Counter-Strike (1.6) is an all-time classic and one of the first games that I owned and played on my Steam account. I even bought it boxed and with that, started my journey on Steam.  Counter-Strike is a simple, yet so fun, game. You choose a team, in which your objectives vary. You can play as terrorists or Counter-terrorists. As terrorists, you keep and defend hostages, place bombs at specific sites and prevent the counter-terrorists from defusing them. As counter-terrorists, you try to save the hostages and defuse the bombs that terrorist have placed.   Meanwhile, you pump each other full of lead. I especially liked the VIP mode, in which one player is appointed as a target that will win the round if eliminated. The other players on your team need to defend you with their lives until the time is up to win. It is a unique and fun experience that was most fun at LAN parties.  When starting the round, you choose/buy your weapons. You can choose a variety of pistols, sub-machine guns, heavy assault rifles, sniper rifles and grenades. Some weapons work better for you than others, so half the fun is trying to figure out which weapon has the right feeling and handling for you. The weapons themselves however, are well balanced and I did not experience any unfair advantages with a specific weapon.  The Graphics in Counter-Strike are really nice for the time. They are well rendered and textured, and the frame rate is spot on. No tearing, no lag, it runs smooth as butter. The animations are stiff and when killed, you drop dead as a brick, but this the charm that the game has.  In terms of sound, this game nails it, especially for the time period. Guns sound aggressive and loud, and explosions can be felt through your headset. It is spot on and holds up great with today’s standards.  The controls are easy to learn and work fluent and responsive.  My only problem at the time with Counter-Strike was the limited time to choose your gear before the round starts. It is completely logical that players do not wait until everyone choose their shiny guns, but when first playing, I was still checking what weapon would be best for me, and before I knew it, I had forty holes in me. But, like with many other First Person Shooters, especially online, I just need to git gut.    I still cherish the memories of this game at the many LAN parties I attended to, the pure joy, tension and competitive game play that had this unique experience back then. The thrill when you finally blow someone up with a well lobbed grenade, the satisfaction when you finally sent a successful sniper bullet through someone’s skull, it was just amazing. Counter-Strike will always be one of my favorite online shooters today.   The upgraded Counter-Strike: Source introduces new graphics and an even smoother experience, however, Counter-Strike (1.6) will always remain an all-time gem that can be played any time. When I am feeling old, I just play this version over the Source remake or Global Offensive, just for good old times.   Definitely recommend this timeless relic.

Wieloosobowa modyfikacja kultowego Half-Life’a, przygotowana przez twórców oryginału ze studia Valve Software. Gra jest taktyczną strzelaniną FPP, w której naprzeciw siebie stają dwie drużyny, reprezentujące terrorystów oraz wyspecjalizowane oddziały antyterrorystyczne. Każda z ekip ma do dyspozycji dedykowany arsenał broni, którą przygotowano w oparciu o oryginalne wyposażenie oddziałów specjalnych z różnych państw (jak Navy Seals, GSG9, GIGN czy SAS). Do wyboru mamy trzy podstawowe tryby rozgrywki, polegające – w zależności od wybranej strony – na podkładaniu lub rozbrajaniu bomb, uwalnianiu zakładników bądź dokonywaniu zamachów na ważne osobistości. Kolejne udane misje premiowane są gotówką, dzięki której możemy kupować nową broń oraz elementy wyposażenia żołnierzy. Counter-Strike doczekał się niezliczonej wręcz ilości fanowskich modyfikacji, zaś w wydaniach oficjalnych najczęściej łączony jest z multiplayerowymi dodatkami do macierzystego Half-Life’a.
